flavorPhrases: Wedged into a crack in the cliff face, barely visible from below.
Beneath a cairn at the ridge line, the stones placed with purpose.
The mountain hut's floorboards are loose. Someone used the crawlspace.
A narrow chimney in the rock face. The opening at the top conceals {container}.
The goat trail ends at a shelf. Someone camped here, and left something behind.
Ice-crusted and half-buried in scree. The oilcloth wrapping saved it.
